fixes_applied.title: _iso_to_epoch_crossplatform() WARN on BusyBox Alpine silent failure
fixes_applied.change: Added local epoch variable, capture output from python3/GNU-date calls, then emit [WARN] when epoch is empty but input is non-empty
fixes_applied.warn_message: [WARN] Pause timeout calc failed: neither python3 nor GNU date available. Pause-timeout auto-abort disabled on this host. Install python3 to enable.

fixes_applied.title: sanitize_block_reason() LOWER-VAR bare-keyword gap
fixes_applied.change: Added Pattern 18 (LOWER-VAR-BARE) BEFORE existing LOWER-VAR compound pattern. Covers: pass, password, secret, token, key, api-key, access-key, auth as bare variable names. Pattern count updated: 17 → 18.
fixes_applied.aws_overlap: AWS_SECRET_KEY=abc is uppercase — caught by UPPER-VAR (row 2) before reaching LOWER-VAR-BARE; no overlap issue

regression_upper_var.note: UPPER-VAR pattern (row 2) fires first for all-caps names
